metadata.purpose: Document revenue generation systems, billing models, and financial workflows

time_and_materials.description: Bill actual hours worked at shop rate

flat_rate.description: Pre-determined price for specific services regardless of actual time
flat_rate.evaluation_status: Currently evaluating profitability - need flat rate amounts from billing to compare profit/loss
flat_rate.risk: If actual hours exceed flat rate hours, shop loses money
flat_rate.opportunity: If actual hours less than flat rate, shop gains margin

wip_system.definition: Work In Progress - value of unbilled labor on open work orders

mechanics.labor_entry: When techs log time, labor cost accumulates in WIP
mechanics.billing: When WO is billed, WIP converts to revenue
mechanics.healthy_state: Positive balance = unbilled work waiting to convert
mechanics.unhealthy_state: Negative balance = overdrawn, more labor than can be billed

steps: Filter Time Sold report for SDV shop
Cross-reference with Anchor report (OPEN WOs only)
Exclude any WOs that are already billed
special_wip_report.critical_note: MUST verify WO is open before including in calculation

friday.source_1: Matt Nelson - Satellite A/B rankings and network data
friday.action: Forward to Gmail, update dashboard comparisons

employee_loan_accounting.scenario: Techs from other facilities work at Denver temporarily
employee_loan_accounting.example: DB1UA work order from New Jersey facility

denver_impact.hours: Count toward Denver paid hours (B hours)
denver_impact.ab_ratio_effect: Can negatively impact Denver A/B if hours not matched by billing

nps_revenue_protection.purpose: Ensure customer satisfaction to protect repeat business

workflow.action: Send NPS survey via dashboard Goals tab
workflow.mechanism: Click button → Outlook Web opens with pre-filled email
workflow.email_format: Subject includes registration#, body ends at 'Best Regards,' (signature auto-appends)
